ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "job_industry_category" TEXT /* Industry category in which the customer works */,
  "wealth_segment" TEXT /* Wealth segment classification of the customer */,
  "deceased_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicator if the customer is deceased */,
  "owns_car" INTEGER /* Indicator if the customer owns a car */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the customer with the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the customer (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "last_interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction with the customer */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer (e.g., email, phone, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the purchase */,
  "past_3_years_bike_related_purchases" INTEGER /* Number of bike-related purchases in the past three years */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product purchased */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount spent on the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property valuation record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the valuation */,
  "property_valuation" REAL /* Valuation of the customer's property */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the property valuation */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, apartment) */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square meters */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
